calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Feb-11-2010 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for OSC hearing for Change of Name of a Minor.
Dept. 218, Commissioner: William R. Gargano, Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, CSR: Vicki Gross, #5525.

Petitioners Leijian Liu and Chunyan Sun were present in pro per as Guardians Ad Litem for the minor Dan Ying Liu, who was also present at today's hearing.
Petitioners were placed under oath and examined.
Zhi Zhi Ye was placed under oath and served as Cantonese speaking interpreter for petitioners.
Proof of Publication was filed on December 30, 2009.

No objections to the proposed change of name were made at the hearing.
It appears to the satisfaction of the Court that all the allegations in the petition are true, correct and sufficient, and that the petition should be granted.

The Court grants the petition for Change of Name of the Minor to: Amy Danying Liu.

Decree Changing Name was submitted to and signed by the Court.
